commit.subject: LU-13417 test: replay-dual 22d with 'lfs mkdir'
commit.message:
LU-13417 test: replay-dual 22d with 'lfs mkdir'

Use lfs mkdir in replay-dual 22d to see whether it works.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 ostcount=4 env=PTLDEBUG=all,DEBUG_SIZE=128 testlist=replay-dual
Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I27c01e4cc152594b1f019e8dd2c21586cf33e142
